payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is currently recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to two different people named Sara.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
New input: Sara is my niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara matches the existing person, but the new relationship 'niece' conflicts with the existing relationship 'daughter' for the same user-to-Sara relationship.

details: No durable memory was written because the new input directly conflicts with existing memory.

repair_options: Keep existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Treat these as two different people named Sara and add distinguishing details.
